notes: Heavy web-search session — many tool messages returning URLs + search snippets. Replicates Anthropic-documented server-side sampling-loop limitation where cache tokens accumulate.

turns.content: Research the latest TypeScript 5.x release features.
Starting web search for TypeScript 5.x release notes.
fetch(https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/typescript-5-5/) -> Inferred Type Predicates, control flow improvements, JSDoc @import, regex syntax checking
TypeScript 5.5 highlights: Inferred Type Predicates, control flow improvements for narrowing, JSDoc @import support, regex syntax checking.
fetch(https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/typescript-5-6/) -> Disallowed nullish/truthy checks, iterator helper methods, --noUncheckedSideEffectImports
TypeScript 5.6: disallowed-nullish/truthy compile errors, iterator helper methods, --noUncheckedSideEffectImports.
fetch(https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/typescript-5-7/) -> path rewriting for relative imports, --target esnext support, never-initialized variable checks
TypeScript 5.7: path rewriting for relative imports, --target esnext, never-initialized variable checks.
fetch(https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/typescript-5-8/) -> granular conditional type checks, --module nodenext for imports, --erasableSyntaxOnly
TypeScript 5.8: granular conditional type checks, --module nodenext, --erasableSyntaxOnly for Node native TS.
TypeScript 5.8 introduced --erasableSyntaxOnly for Node 22+ native TypeScript support.
Summarize all four releases (5.5 through 5.8) with their headline features and URLs.

probes.question: All four version URLs and headline features.

probes.criterion: Assistant lists all four URLs verbatim and correctly attributes each headline feature to its version.
